name: KTK ASHP/B2/01 live service
source: scanned.pdf - KTK Multipower_v9.34.00 21-221296-ID40.mcxs variable list; site photo 2026-06-05 - filtered to live/status/alarm points; excludes service/serial settings that timed out on site

connection.notes: The scan shows Serial address (Modbus)=40, baud enum 6=19200, serial settings 0=8N1. If no reply, confirm the service menu and try the previous KTK default slave 10.
